sentences.target: Tu peux mesurer la longueur de la table.
sentences.reading: /ty pø mə.zy.ʁe la lɔ̃ɡœʁ də la tabl/

translations.fr: Tu peux mesurer la longueur de la table.
translations.ipa: /ty pø mə.zy.ʁe la lɔ̃ɡœʁ də la tabl/
translations.en: Can you measure the table's length?
translations.es: ¿Puedes medir el largo de la mesa?
translations.de: Kannst du die Länge des Tisches messen?
translations.it: Puoi misurare la lunghezza del tavolo?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能量一下桌子的长度吗？
translations.yue: 你可唔可以量下張枱嘅長度？
translations.pt: Você pode medir o comprimento da mesa?
translations.he: אתה יכול למדוד את אורך השולחן?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đo chiều dài của cái bàn không?
translations.nl: Kun je de lengte van de tafel meten?
translations.hu: Meg tudod mérni az asztal hosszát?
translations.hi: क्या तुम मेज़ की लंबाई नाप सकते हो?
translations.el: Μπορείς να μετρήσεις το μήκος του τραπεζιού;
translations.nb: Kan du måle lengden på bordet?
translations.ja: テーブルの長さを測ってくれる？

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular, selecting the infinitive 'mesurer'.
Infinitive main verb complement of the modal 'pouvoir'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'longueur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement ('de la table').
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular.

sentences.target: La longueur de ce pantalon ne va pas.
sentences.reading: /la lɔ̃ɡœʁ də sə pɑ̃.ta.lɔ̃ nə va pa/

translations.fr: La longueur de ce pantalon ne va pas.
translations.ipa: /la lɔ̃ɡœʁ də sə pɑ̃.ta.lɔ̃ nə va pa/
translations.en: The length of these pants doesn't work.
translations.es: El largo de este pantalón no está bien.
translations.de: Die Länge dieser Hose passt nicht.
translations.it: La lunghezza di questi pantaloni non va bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条裤子的长度不合适。
translations.pt: O comprimento desta calça não está certo.
translations.vi: Chiều dài của chiếc quần này không phù hợp.
translations.nl: De lengte van deze broek is niet goed.
translations.hu: Ennek a nadrágnak a hossza nem megfelelő.
translations.hi: इस पैंट की लंबाई ठीक नहीं है.
translations.pl: Długość tych spodni nie jest odpowiednia.
translations.el: Το μήκος αυτού του παντελονιού δεν είναι σωστό.
translations.nb: Lengden på denne buksen er ikke riktig.
translations.sv: Längden på de här byxorna stämmer inte.
translations.ro: Lungimea acestor pantaloni nu este potrivită.
translations.da: Længden på disse bukser passer ikke.
translations.ja: このズボンの丈が合わない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'longueur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Preposition introducing the complement of the noun ('de ce pantalon').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'pantalon'.
Common noun, masculine singular.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'.
Main lexical verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Negative adverb; second element completing the 'ne ... pas' negation.

sentences.target: On vérifie la longueur du câble ensemble.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ve.ʁi.fi la lɔ̃ɡœʁ dy kɑbl ɑ̃.sɑ̃bl/

translations.fr: On vérifie la longueur du câble ensemble.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ve.ʁi.fi la lɔ̃ɡœʁ dy kɑbl ɑ̃.sɑ̃bl/
translations.en: We're checking the length of the cable together.
translations.es: Estamos comprobando la longitud del cable juntos.
translations.de: Wir prüfen gemeinsam die Länge des Kabels.
translations.it: Stiamo controllando insieme la lunghezza del cavo.
translations.ko: 우리는 같이 케이블 길이를 확인하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一起检查电缆的长度。
translations.yue: 我哋一齊檢查條電纜嘅長度。
translations.pt: Estamos verificando juntos o comprimento do cabo.
translations.he: אנחנו בודקים יחד את אורך הכבל.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang kiểm tra độ dài của dây cáp cùng nhau.
translations.ar: نحن نتحقق من طول الكابل معًا.
translations.nl: We controleren samen de lengte van de kabel.
translations.hi: हम मिलकर केबल की लंबाई जांच रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ελέγχουμε μαζί το μήκος του καλωδίου.
translations.nb: Vi sjekker lengden på kabelen sammen.
translations.id: Kita sedang memeriksa panjang kabel bersama.
translations.da: Vi kontrollerer længden på kablet sammen.
translations.ja: 一緒にケーブルの長さを確認しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with 'On'.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'longueur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'vérifie'.
Contraction of 'de' + 'le'; preposition 'of' with a definite article introducing 'câble'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'du'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates joint action.

sentences.target: Il faut une longueur de deux mètres.
sentences.reading: /il fo yn lɔ̃ɡœʁ də dø mɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Il faut une longueur de deux mètres.
translations.ipa: /il fo yn lɔ̃ɡœʁ də dø mɛtʁ/
translations.en: We need a length of two meters.
translations.es: Necesitamos una longitud de dos metros.
translations.de: Wir brauchen eine Länge von zwei Metern.
translations.it: Ci serve una lunghezza di due metri.
translations.pt: Precisamos de um comprimento de dois metros.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים אורך של שני מטרים.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần chiều dài hai mét.
translations.nl: We hebben een lengte van twee meter nodig.
translations.hi: हमें दो मीटर की लंबाई चाहिए.
translations.nb: Vi trenger en lengde på to meter.
translations.sv: Vi behöver en längd på två meter.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de o lungime de doi metri.
translations.da: Vi har brug for en længde på to meter.
translations.ja: 二メートルの長さが必要です.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used with 'falloir'.
Impersonal verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; expresses necessity.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'longueur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the required NP.
Preposition introducing a measure complement ('de deux mètres').
Cardinal numeral.
Common noun, masculine plural; unit of measure.
